tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall address
 edit "UbuntuComputer"
  set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
 next
end
config firewall address
 edit "Allowed_Internet"
  set subnet 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
 next
end
config firewall policy
 edit 0
  set name "Allow_Ubuntu_to_Allowed_Internet_HTTPS"
  set srcintf "Port2"
  set dstintf "Port1"
  set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
  set dstaddr "Allowed_Internet"
  set action accept
  set schedule "always"
  set service "HTTPS"
  set nat enable
 next
 edit 0
  set name "Deny_Ubuntu_to_Any_HTTPS"
  set srcintf "Port2"
  set dstintf "Port1"
  set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
  set dstaddr "all"
  set action deny
  set schedule "always"
  set service "HTTPS"
 next
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
    edit "port3"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 3
next
    edit "port4"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 4
    next
    edit "port5"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 5
    next
    edit "port6"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 6
    next
    edit "port7"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 7
    next
    edit "port8"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
set snmp-index 8
    next
    edit "port9"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 9
    next
    edit "port10"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 10
    next
    edit "naf.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set src-check disable
        set snmp-index 11
    next
    edit "l2t.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set snmp-index 12
    next
    edit "ssl.root"
set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set alias "SSL VPN interface"
        set snmp-index 13
    next
    edit "fortilink"
        set vdom "root"
        set fortilink enable
        set ip 10.255.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set snmp-index 14
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

  set name "Allow_Ubuntu_HTTPS"
  set srcintf "port2"
  set dstintf "port1"
  set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
  set dstaddr "Allowed_Internet"
  set action accept
  set schedule "always"
  set service "HTTPS"
  set nat enable
 next

  set name "Deny_Ubuntu_HTTPS"
  set srcintf "port2"
  set dstintf "port1"
  set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
  set dstaddr "all"
  set action deny
  set schedule "always"
  set service "HTTPS"
 next
end
show firewall policy"}

config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_HTTPS"
        set uuid fb1350f4-2abb-51f1-921d-c4fba411589f
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "Allowed_Internet"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
next
    edit 3
        set name "Deny_Ubuntu_HTTPS"
        set uuid fb228240-2abb-51f1-0714-ba110e9af297
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end
